title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. constrictiforme
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. constrictiforme is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the UK and other parts of Europe. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. constrictiforme are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
